DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO FOOD BANK, BARBARA FORDE AND DAVID SMOOT'S DEMURRER TO MULTIPLE CAUSES OF ACTION OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.

APPEARANCES: David A. Lucero, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP 438-6641 for defts & moving parties (gave notice a few minutes after 4); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the 4th & 5th causes of action as to all defendants. Sustained without leave to amend as to the 6th cause of action as to all defendants. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
